name: doorstep-mobile
description: Production-ready full-stack delivery platform built with React, TypeScript, Express, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @doorstep/backend && npm run lint --workspace @doorstep/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @doorstep/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @doorstep/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @doorstep/backend && npm run build --workspace @doorstep/frontend
